hero.title: Your Technology Partner in Israel
hero.subtitle: RSTECH Electronics Ltd is the authorized Israeli representative of world-leading technology companies — bringing global innovation to local industries.

companies.title: Our Principal Companies
companies.subtitle: We represent three world-class technology leaders in Israel

about.title: RSTECH Electronics Ltd
about.body: RSTECH Electronics Ltd is the authorized Israeli representative of leading global technology companies. We provide direct access to world-class products for Israeli customers in medical, semiconductor, defense, and industrial markets — backed by local technical support and Hebrew-language service.

why.title: Why RSTECH?
why.localDesc: Israeli-based technical team for fast response and on-site support.
why.authorizedDesc: Direct manufacturer relationships ensure product authenticity and full warranty.
why.expertiseDesc: Deep knowledge of advanced components for demanding industrial, medical, and defense applications.
why.rangeDesc: Access to products from W.L. Gore, Tsubaki Kabelschlepp, and JAE — all under one roof.

companies.title: Our Principal Companies
companies.subtitle: World-class technology partners represented by RSTECH Electronics in Israel

gore.name: W.L. Gore & Associates
gore.tagline: Pushing the boundaries of what's possible
gore.description: W.L. Gore & Associates is a global materials science company renowned for its innovative fluoropolymer solutions, including GORE-TEX® fabrics, vascular grafts, and advanced electronic interconnect products.
gore.products: Cable & Interconnect Assemblies, Vascular Grafts, Filtration Products, Sealants

tsubaki.name: Tsubaki Kabelschlepp
tsubaki.description: Tsubaki Kabelschlepp is a world leader in energy chain systems and cable management solutions, providing robust cable carriers, drag chains, and triflex® systems for dynamic applications in automation and machinery.
tsubaki.industries: Automation, Machine Tools, Robotics, Semiconductor, Medical
tsubaki.products: Energy Chains, Cable Carriers, Triflex® Systems, Steel Carriers, Mounting Accessories

jae.name: JAE — Japan Aviation Electronics
jae.description: JAE (Japan Aviation Electronics Industry) is a premier manufacturer of high-precision connectors and electronic components, delivering reliable connectivity solutions for aerospace, automotive, consumer electronics, and industrial applications.
jae.industries: Aerospace, Automotive, Consumer Electronics, Industrial, Medical
jae.products: Board-to-Board Connectors, Wire-to-Board Connectors, FPC Connectors, Circular Connectors, Coaxial Connectors

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: RSTECH Electronics Ltd — Israel's gateway to world-class technology.
about.body1: RSTECH Electronics Ltd is an Israeli company specializing in the representation and distribution of premium global technology brands. We serve customers across a wide range of industries including medical devices, semiconductor manufacturing, defense, aerospace, and industrial automation.
about.body2: As the authorized Israeli representative of W.L. Gore & Associates, Tsubaki Kabelschlepp, and JAE, we provide direct access to these manufacturers' full product portfolios, supported by local technical expertise and Hebrew-language service.
about.missionBody: To be the most trusted technology partner for Israeli companies — connecting local industries with the world's best components, backed by dedicated technical support.
about.ctaBody: Contact our team for technical consultation, product specifications, or pricing.
why: Authorized representative with direct manufacturer relationships
Local Israeli technical team for fast, on-site support
Full access to global product catalogs

contact.title: Contact RSTECH
contact.subtitle: Reach out for technical consultation, product inquiries, or pricing — our team responds quickly.
contact.productPlaceholder: e.g. W.L. Gore cables, JAE connectors...
contact.successBody: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at info@rstech.co.il.
contact.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
contact.trustNote: All inquiries are handled by our local Israeli team. We respond in Hebrew and English.

footer.tagline: Authorized Israeli representative of W.L. Gore, Tsubaki Kabelschlepp & JAE.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: RSTECH Electronics is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you understand our data practices.
privacy.whoWeAreText: RSTECH Electronics Ltd is an Israeli company specializing in the representation and distribution of premium global technology brands. We serve customers across medical devices, semiconductors, defense, aerospace, and industrial automation sectors.
privacy.whatWeCollectText: We collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact form to respond to your inquiries:
collectList: Any additional information you provide in your inquiry
privacy.howWeUseText: The information you provide is used exclusively for:
useList: Responding to your inquiry or question
Providing technical consultation or product information
Following up on sales inquiries or requests for quotation
Improving our service and customer communication
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Information is only shared with our principal manufacturers (W.L. Gore, Tsubaki Kabelschlepp, JAE) when necessary to fulfill your specific product or technical requests, and only with your knowledge.
privacy.dataRetention: How Long We Keep Your Data
privacy.dataRetentionText: We retain information submitted through our contact form for 3 years to maintain service records and follow-up communications. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses essential cookies to maintain site functionality and analytics to improve user experience. We do not use cookies for marketing or tracking purposes. You can disable cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.yourRightsText: Under Israeli Privacy Protection Law and GDPR, you have the right to:
rightsList: Access your personal data and request a copy
Receive your data in a portable format
privacy.privacyContactText: For privacy-related requests or inquiries, please contact us at:
privacy.responseTime: We commit to responding to privacy requests within 5 business days.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.subtitle: RSTECH Electronics is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for all users.
accessibility.commitmentText: RSTECH Electronics is committed to making our website accessible to all users, including those with disabilities. We strive to conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility guidelines.
featuresList: Semantic HTML structure for proper content hierarchy
Keyboard navigation support throughout the site
Alt text for all images and visual content
High contrast color schemes for readability
Responsive design that works on all device sizes
Form labels and error messages for accessibility
accessibility.continuousText: We regularly test and improve accessibility features. If you encounter any accessibility barriers on our website, please let us know.
accessibility.feedbackText: If you experience difficulty accessing any part of this website, please contact us:
accessibility.feedbackResponse: We will respond to accessibility feedback within 3 business days.
accessibility.toolbarIntro: Use the accessibility toolbar on the left side of the page to adjust:
accessibility.toolbarFontSize: Font Size: Increase text size up to 125% for better readability
accessibility.toolbarContrast: Color Contrast: Choose high contrast or inverted color modes
accessibility.toolbarDisplay: Display Options: Enable grayscale mode or dyslexia-friendly fonts
accessibility.toolbarNavigation: Navigation: Full keyboard navigation support throughout the site
accessibility.knownLimitationsIntro: While we strive for full accessibility, some areas may have limitations:
accessibility.limitationThirdParty: Embedded third-party content may not fully comply with accessibility standards
accessibility.limitationPDF: PDF documents may have varying levels of screen reader optimization
accessibility.limitationLegacy: Legacy content is continuously being updated for accessibility
accessibility.limitationContact: If you encounter any accessibility barriers, please let us know immediately so we can address them.
accessibility.complianceStatement: This website targets compliance with Israeli Standard SI 5568, which is based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
notFound.suggestion: Let's get you back on track:
